title: US Eases Venezuela Oil Sanctions Amid Iran War
summary: To stabilize oil prices during the Iran war, the US Treasury Department is easing sanctions on Venezuela's state oil company.
charlotte_impact: Easing sanctions aims to increase global oil supply and mitigate price surges caused by the conflict in Iran.

title: Intelligence Report on Iran's Nuclear Program Mixed
summary: Director of National Intelligence gave Senate conflicting information on Iran's nuclear program before the war.
charlotte_impact: Uncertainty regarding Iran's nuclear capabilities adds complexity to the ongoing conflict.

title: 'Bachelorette' Taylor Frankie Paul Addresses Domestic Violence Allegations

title: Apple Announces 13 Enhancements in iOS 26.4 Update

title: Stopping GLP-1s Increases Heart Attack, Stroke Risk
summary: Study shows even short breaks in GLP-1 treatment raise the risk of heart attack, stroke, and death for Type 2 diabetes patients.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of consistent GLP-1 medication adherence for high-risk patients.

title: Federal Reserve Issues FOMC Statement
summary: The Federal Reserve reports solid economic expansion but notes low job gains and a stable unemployment rate.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights into the current economic state and future monetary policy decisions.

title: Northern Lights Possible in Oregon Tonight

title: Pulse Nightclub Demolished After Massacre
